message:
chore(deps): update Cargo.lock for prost version split (0.13.5 + 0.14.3)

Cargo.lock now resolves both prost 0.13.5 and 0.14.3 — a transitive
dependency pulled in the older version alongside the existing 0.14.3.
All existing prost references disambiguated to prost 0.14.3 per Cargo's
standard multi-version handling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -286,6 +286,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "parking_lot",
  "pin-project",
  "polling",
+ "prost 0.13.5",
  "ring",
  "rmp-serde",
  "rustls",
@@ -9057,7 +9058,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "opentelemetry-http",
  "opentelemetry-proto",
  "opentelemetry_sdk",
- "prost",
+ "prost 0.14.3",
  "reqwest 0.12.28",
  "thiserror 2.0.18",
  "tokio",

+ "prost-derive 0.14.3",
